---
name: Submit a registry entry
about: Drag-and-drop a packed entry file; a bot validates it and opens a PR.
title: "[entry] "
labels: ["submit-entry"]
---

**Drag and drop your entry file here** — the `recon-registry-out/<name>.json` produced by
`npx recon-registry pack` — then click **Submit new issue**.

A bot downloads it, validates it, and opens a PR. (No `gh`, fork, or write access needed.)
